summary: This topic covers the ability to customize the format of fee receipts, including integrating the institution's logo and adjusting the display of fee heads, installments, and remarks.
steps: As an administrator or configurator, provide the institution's logo to the ERP team for integration into the receipt template.
If a specific custom design is required, provide detailed design specifications to the ERP team.
Otherwise, the system will use a default customizable template that can be adjusted.
business_rules: Fee receipts will display the collected amount, any entered remarks, and details of the fee heads and installments paid.
important_notes: The institution's logo can be prominently displayed on the fee receipt.
The receipt format can be fully customized to meet specific institutional requirements.
Remarks entered during the fee collection process will be printed on the receipt.
Concession details, if applied, will also be visible on the receipt.
questions: Can I customize the layout and content of the fee receipt?
How do I add our institution's logo to the fee receipts?
Will the fee receipt show details of concessions applied?
What information is typically included on the fee receipt?
Can the display of fee heads and installments on the receipt be changed?
